{{Quote|Don't worry about that last customer, it's not your fault. Drixa always has something to complain about.|[[Byxle Pedette]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TDC" />}}
'''Drixa Dreul''' was an elderly [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who lived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]. Sometime after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] who was working for [[Byxle Pedette|Dyxle Pedette]]'s [[Tasty Dried Critters]] came by her house to deliver an order of fast food. When the spacer got there, Drixa found out that the [[fungus dippers]] that she ordered were not there. She complained to the spacer that the spacer and Dyxle messed up her order, then sent the bill to Dyxle, minus the cost of the fungus dippers.<ref name="SWG:TDC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Drixa Dreul was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TDC" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Drixa Dreul was added to the game upon the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
